headline: Amid Nvidia Craze, Jim Cramer Sees A Chip Stock 'Not On Anyone's Radar' About To Break Out: Here's What He Said
summary: Despite it not being on anyone's radar, Jim Cramer believes that Broadcom is about to break out.

headline: Tesla CEO Elon Musk Draws Parallel Between Netflix's Decision To Focus On Streaming Over Renting DVDs To EV Maker Doubling Down On Vehicle Autonomy
summary: Tesla is currently faced with dropping share value after it decided to focus all its efforts and resources on vehicle autonomy.

headline: Sundar Pichai Finally Responds To Microsoft CEO's Comments About Making Google Dance: 'One Of The Ways You Can Do The Wrong Thing Is By ... Playing To Someone Else's Dance Music'
summary: Alphabet's Sundar Pichai brushes off Microsoft's Satya Nadella's claim about Bing challenging Google, stressing the value of sticking to one's strategy over reacting to rivals.

headline: Tesla's Ongoing Austerity Measures, Rivian-Apple Partnership Buzz, Biden Administration's Clampdown: Biggest EV Stories Of The Week
summary: Teething trouble, demand slowdown, competition and profitability issues all continue to weigh down on the EV industry.

headline: China Likely To Retaliate Against US Tariffs On Electric Vehicles, Says Top Analyst Dan Ives: 'Game Of Thrones Continues To Play Out'
summary: Wedbush analyst Dan Ives is of the opinion that China would retaliate if the U.S. were to increase tariffs on electric vehicle imports from China.

headline: OpenAI Top Exec Says It's Too Early To Gauge AI's Full Economic Impact: 'We've A Year To Reshape The Economy? That's A Tall Order'
summary: OpenAI COO Brad Lightcap stated that it is too early to determine the full economic impact of AI, as the technology has not yet significantly altered the economy but may lead to more pronounced changes in the future.

headline: Tesla Analyst Sees Annual Shareholder Meeting As Key To Determining Elon Musk-Led Company's Future Strategy

summary: OpenAI CEO Sam Altman denies rumors of search engine or GPT-5 launch, confirms May 13 event to discuss new projects.

headline: Elon Musk Says 'Tesla Was The Only Car Company Attacked' After 16 Protesters Were Taken Into Custody In Berlin: 'There Is More To This Than Meets The Eye'
summary: Protestors against Tesla Inc's expansion efforts at its gigafactory in Berlin on Friday attempted to storm the company's factory, damaged several of the company's EVs, and even injured several police officers.

headline: Apple Inches Closer To Choosing Sam Altman-Led OpenAI To Integrate ChatGPT On iPhones: Report
summary: Apple is nearing a deal to integrate OpenAI's technology into the iPhone, aiming to enhance iOS 18 with new artificial intelligence features.

headline: Bloomberg Reported Apple Closes In On Deal With OpenAI To Put ChatGPT On iPhone
